name: Easy Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the pizza dough onto an 18-inch piece of lightly floured waxed paper.
2. Roll the dough into a 16 by 10 inch rectangle.
3. Cut the dough lengthwise into 10 1/4 inch-wide strips.
4. Shape each strip of dough into a circle, overlapping about 4 inches from each end and leaving ends free.
5. Taking one end of the dough in each hand, twist at the point where the dough overlaps.
6. Carefully lift each end across to the edge of the circle opposite it.
7. Tuck the ends under to seal.
8. Place the pretzels 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Stir together the egg and water.
10. Brush the pretzels with the egg mixture.
11. Sprinkle with sesame seed, poppy seed, coarse salt, garlic salt or onion salt.
12. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 15 to 17 minutes or until golden.
13. Serve warm.
